item.title: Warner Bros Interactive Entertainment UK - LEGO Harry Potter Collection Code In Box Nintendo Switch
item.description: You can find Warner Bros Interactive Entertainment UK - LEGO Harry Potter Collection Code In Box Nintendo Switch with a discount here: ℹ️: LEGO Harry Potter: Years 1-4 is based on the first four books and films-Harry Potter and the Philosophers stone , Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets , Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban and Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire -allowing fans to experience Harrys first four years at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry in full LEGO form Character Pack DLC included featuring 10 characters-Godric Gryffindor, Harry (Yule Ball), Helga Hufflepuff, Lockhart (Straightjacket), Luna (Lion Head), Peeves, Hermione (Pink Dress), Ron Weasley (Ghoul), Rowena Ravenclaw and Salazar Slytherin Code-in-box product.
